result.reasoning: The PROJECT_ESSENCE focuses on Agent Taming, prioritizing safety, determinism, and verification (verifikacija). The PROPOSED_ACTION, researching Chain of Verification (CoV) papers to improve reliability, directly targets the 'verification' component, which is a key mechanism for achieving safety and determinism in AI agents.

Projekt je fokusiran na kritičnu sigurnost AI agenata, determinizam i verifikaciju (duboka tehnička istraživanja). Predložena akcija je dodavanje kozmetičkog UI elementa (slike mačaka) za poboljšanje UX-a, što je potpuno irelevantno za osnovne ciljeve Agent Taminga, sigurnosti i verifikacije.

The action tests the functional implementation of the 'Agent Taming' system. Using a browser agent to execute a complex, real-world, transactional task (UberEats) is a high-value operational stress test. It directly evaluates the system's ability to maintain safety, determinism, and verifiability during complex navigation and financial processes, which are core objectives of the project.
